import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5000/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Students API
export const studentAPI={getAll:()=>api.get('/students'),getById:id=>api.get("/students/".concat(id)),add:student=>api.post('/students/add',student),addBulk:students=>api.post('/students/bulk',{students}),update:(id,student)=>api.put("/students/".concat(id),student),delete:id=>api.delete("/students/".concat(id))};// Subjects API
export const subjectAPI={getAll:()=>api.get('/subjects'),getById:code=>api.get("/subjects/".concat(code)),add:subject=>api.post('/subjects/add',subject),addBulk:subjects=>api.post('/subjects/bulk',{subjects}),update:(code,subject)=>api.put("/subjects/".concat(code),subject),delete:code=>api.delete("/subjects/".concat(code))};// Halls API
export const hallAPI={getAll:()=>api.get('/halls'),getById:id=>api.get("/halls/".concat(id)),add:hall=>api.post('/halls/add',hall),addBulk:halls=>api.post('/halls/bulk',{halls}),update:(id,hall)=>api.put("/halls/".concat(id),hall),delete:id=>api.delete("/halls/".concat(id))};// Teachers API
export const teacherAPI={getAll:()=>api.get('/teachers'),getById:id=>api.get("/teachers/".concat(id)),add:teacher=>api.post('/teachers/add',teacher),addBulk:teachers=>api.post('/teachers/bulk',{teachers}),update:(id,teacher)=>api.put("/teachers/".concat(id),teacher),delete:id=>api.delete("/teachers/".concat(id))};// Schedule API
export const scheduleAPI={generate:data=>api.post('/schedule/generate',data),getAll:()=>api.get('/schedule/all'),getByDate:date=>api.get("/schedule/date/".concat(date)),getByDepartment:dept=>api.get("/schedule/department/".concat(dept)),getBySemester:sem=>api.get("/schedule/semester/".concat(sem)),getStats:()=>api.get('/schedule/stats'),clear:()=>api.delete('/schedule/clear')};export default api;
